subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Most Merciful! Through the favors and bounties of the Ancient Beauty—may my spirit be a sacrifice unto Him—it is hoped that each one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء الرحمن از الطاف و عنایت جمال قدم روحی له الفداء امید است که هر یک از
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action
